positive: A symmetrical, centralized design featuring a mystical forest of bioluminescent flora and fauna. The main elements include stylized, elegant silhouettes of glowing butterflies, coiled river spirits, and intricately patterned ferns. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, electric cyan, emerald green, and touches of soft gold luminescence. The style is highly decorative neo-Art Nouveau combined with modern graphic minimalist etching. Composition must be perfectly balanced and cyclical, designed to wrap or repeat cleanly. Emphasis on strong, crisp linework, high contrast, and clean negative space suitable for black-and-white or single-color apparel printing. Studio lighting, vector illustration quality, ultra-detailed.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, deformed, noise, photorealism, grayscales, grayscale, jpeg artifacts
